twitter_thread: 4 hours of video encoding reduced to 10 minutes with 1 FFmpeg command.
Compiled FFmpeg to WASM, now running 30 encoding tasks in parallel offline.
Dropped -sameq flag, gained 25% quality boost with -crf 18 instead.
Using -threads 3, encoding speedup is 2.5x on quad-core CPU.
Tested 15 video files with WebCLI, no installs or messy dependencies.
What's the most complex video processing task you've accomplished with FFmpeg? #ffmpeg #videoencoding
Verified FFmpeg build integrity, prevented a potential 0-day exploit.
pack.linkedin: I reduced video encoding time from 4 hours to 10 minutes using a single optimized FFmpeg command. Compiling to WASM enabled offline encoding of 30 tasks in parallel. By avoiding deprecated flags and using -crf 18, I gained a 25% quality boost. What specific FFmpeg techniques have you applied to improve your workflow?
